product_name: Signed Weiss Glass Cabochon Starburst Brooch
condition_notes: Two-tier starburst of orange and tomato-red navette glass cabochons around a domed cranberry cabochon center, prong-set in gold-tone. Reverse signed Weiss in an oval cartouche (confirmed; photographed). All stones present, none chipped; secure pin and clasp.

ebay.note: active BIN + Best Offer at $75. Title revised 2026-06-20 to 'Vintage Weiss Glass Cabochon Starburst Brooch Domed Cranberry Cabochon'; description rewritten to include the Glass Cabochon Starburst Brooch + domed cranberry cabochon keywords; eBay custom label set to RG-0023. Repriced 55→75 on 2026-06-19 (realized signed-Weiss comps, BPO §2/§4); reconciled to catalog $75.

photo_overrides.reason: hero_qa tilt=41.6° is a false positive: the brooch is a radially symmetric starburst with no straight edge for the tilt estimator to measure, so the angle is meaningless. Hero is visually upright, level, full-face, on a clean light background. Manually verified during 2026-06-20 reconcile and uploaded to Square as primary (image 54ALZDJWCUNUDYCBSGDGO5V2).
